plugins.prepareCmd: find plugins -name plugin.json -path '*/.claude-plugin/*' -exec sed -i 's/"version": "[^"]*"/"version": "${nextRelease.version}"/' {} + && sed -i 's/"version": "[^"]*"/"version": "${nextRelease.version}"/' .claude-plugin/marketplace.json && sed -i 's/"version": "[^"]*"/"version": "${nextRelease.version}"/' package.json
